deep_dive.title: Behavioral Signatures of Post-Decisional Attention in Preferential Choice
deep_dive.abstract: Attention plays a key role in decision-making by directing limited cognitive resources to relevant information. It has been proposed that attention also biases the decision process, due to a multiplicative interaction between attention and subjective value (e.g., Krajbich et al., 2010). We tested two predictions of models that posit a causal multiplicative effect of attention on decision formation: (i) the last fixation should be more informative about the choice when the overall value of the alternatives is high, and (ii) more attention should be directed to the chosen option when choices conflict with stated preferences than when they do not. Reanalyzing several datasets from a food-choice task, we found no evidence supporting these predictions. An alternative model where attention reflects choices after the decision has completed, explains key observations, including the last-fixation bias, the gaze-cascade effect and the effect of the overall value of the alternatives on response times. However, this model does not fully account for the association between dwell time and choice. We conclude that gaze behavior prior to the choice report likely reflects both decisional and post-decisional processes.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Eye fixation analysis to test attention-biased decision models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 眼动注视分析检验注意力偏差决策模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 眼动注视分析检验注意力偏差决策模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 眼动注视分析检验注意力偏差决策模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Reanalyzing food-choice eye-tracking data, this paper finds no evidence for a causal multiplicative effect of attention on decision formation, challenging existing models.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文通过重新分析食物选择任务中的眼动数据，检验了注意力对决策形成具有因果乘性效应模型的两个预测。结果发现，无论选项价值高低，最后注视对选择的信息性并无差异；冲突选择时也未发现更多注意已选选项。这些发现不支持注意力与主观价值之间的乘性交互假设，对当前决策模型提出了有力挑战，推动了基于注视的计算模型的发展。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文通过重新分析食物选择任务中的眼动数据，检验了注意力对决策形成具有因果乘性效应模型的两个预测。结果发现，无论选项价值高低，最后注视对选择的信息性并无差异；冲突选择时也未发现更多注意已选选项。这些发现不支持注意力与主观价值之间的乘性交互假设，对当前决策模型提出了有力挑战，推动了基于注视的计算模型的发展。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements

quick_skim.title: Can Agents Read the Room? Benchmarking Visual Social Intelligence in Multimodal Simulation
quick_skim.abstract: Social interaction depends on both language and visible social signals, such as facial expressions, posture, gaze, and emotional shifts. Yet existing social-agent benchmarks are largely text-based and rarely test whether multimodal agents can use visual cues to guide interaction. We introduce \textsc{\benchmarkname{}}, a benchmark evaluating visual social intelligence in multimodal social simulation. It contains 240 scenarios, 585 role instances, and 2,340 role-task instances, combining aligned textual-visual evidence, structured role profiles, and four role-level tasks: expression task, characteristic task, interaction regulation task, and interaction outcome task. Evaluating seven recent MLLMs under verbalized-vision and direct-vision reveals a clear gap between local role enactment and interaction management: role-specific expression and conflict handling are near saturation, whereas interaction regulation and visually grounded outcome achievement remain substantially more difficult. The code is released at https://github.com/JunsWan/AgentViSS, and the dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/JunsWan/AgentViSS.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: benchmark for visual social intelligence including gaze cues
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 包含注视线索的视觉社交智能基准
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 包含注视线索的视觉社交智能基准
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 包含注视线索的视觉社交智能基准
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a benchmark evaluating multimodal agents on visual social intelligence including gaze, facial expressions, and posture; may inform gaze-based interaction research.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一个多模态社交模拟基准，用于评估智能体利用视觉社交线索（包括注视、面部表情和姿势）的能力。实验结果揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在阅读视觉社交信号方面的不足，为基于注视的人机交互研究提供了评估工具和启示。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一个多模态社交模拟基准，用于评估智能体利用视觉社交线索（包括注视、面部表情和姿势）的能力。实验结果揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在阅读视觉社交信号方面的不足，为基于注视的人机交互研究提供了评估工具和启示。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 人类意图识别与人机交互（HCI）：基于多模态信号（特别是眼动追踪）的实时意图预测与交互范式研究。probabilistic modeling（概率建模）或 proactive interaction（前瞻性交互）, especially work that connects or combines: multimodal intent prediction eye movement; gaze-based human-computer interaction; eye tracking intention recognition; real-time intent recognition algorithms; real time human intent recognition using eye tracking data; gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response; computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements; probabilistic modeling of human gaze for proactive systems.
